en: unfortunately Helen Mirren and Maggie Smith dropped out at the last second.
ko: 불행히도 헬렌 미렌과 매기 스미스가 마지막 순간에 빠졌어요.

en: and they they called me literally 45 minutes ago and I couldn't find child.
